data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Service contract integration (parts covered)', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions that service contract customers have parts covered, but there is no concrete evidence provided that explicitly verifies the integration of service contracts with parts coverage. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the integration of service contracts with parts coverage.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for service contract integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the service contract integration with parts coverage.
